creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submitter replied in private mail:

Ranma Saotome, 21.10.08, 12:45h CEST:

> On Mon, Oct 20, 2008 at 12:01 PM, Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org> wrote:

> > OK. Can we agree that this PR can be closed and a new one should be sent

> Yes, hopefully tingo himself will post the PR as soon as the

> Thank you very much for you attention.

> ranma42
